name: GREEN BATTERY MINERALS
summary: Green Battery Minerals Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold and graphite properties in Canada. The company holds a 100% interest in Lac Gueret South, a graphite resource in Northern Quebec; and interest in the Stallion property, which is located in the northeastern region of the Stikinia geological terrane. Its projects also include the Berkwood graphite project comprising 38 claims covering 2,052 hectors located in the Manicouagan Regional County Municipality, Quebec; the Cobalt Fold property with a 100% interest, including 40 claims covering an area of 2,176.19 hectares located in C√É¬¥te-Nord area of Quebec; Delebreil lithium property, which comprise 8 claims covering approximately 464.41 hectares located in the Abitibi-T√É¬©miscamingue area of Quebec; and Roscoe vanadium project comprising 40 claims covering 2,189.19 hectors located in Lac √É¬† L'argent, Quebec. The company was formerly known as Goldcore Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Green Battery Minerals Inc. in March 2021. Green Battery Minerals Inc. was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
